use_cases: Primary call-to-action for forms and user interactions
Reset or secondary actions in multi-step workflows
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars
ai_summary: A flexible button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling and Radix UI Slot for composition. Supports keyboard navigation and standard hover states. Commonly used as an atomic building block in shadcn/ui-style design systems for SaaS and web applications.
